label: lettersIntro
text1: In this activity, you're going to help us find some letters.

label: lettersIns
text1: When I say the name of a letter, your job is to find it on the screen and press it.

label: lettersIns2
text1: For example, when you hear:

label: lettersIns3
text1: You should press on the letter t.

label: lettersIns4
text1: And when you hear:

label: lettersIns5
text1: You should press on the letter o.

label: lettersIns6
text1: To hear the letter again, press the speaker button.

label: lettersPractice
text1: It's your turn to try. Remember, your job is to choose the letter you hear.

label: lettersPostPractice
text1: You're ready to try on your own. Remember to choose the letter you hear.

label: lettersUppercaseTrans
text1: Let's do the same thing with uppercase letters!

label: soundsIntro
text1: Now, we're going to do something a little bit different.

label: soundsIns
text1: I'm going to say a sound, and your job is to choose the letter or letters that can spell that sound.

label: soundsIns2
text1: For example, when you hear:

label: soundsIns3
text1: You should press on the letter t.

label: soundsIns4
text1: And when you hear:

label: soundsIns5
text1: You should press on the letter s.

label: soundsIns6
text1: To hear the sound again, press the speaker button.

label: soundsPractice
text1: It's your turn to try. Remember, your job is to choose a letter that can spell the sound.

label: soundsPostPractice
text1: You're ready to try on your own. Remember to choose a letter that can spell the sound.

label: break1
text1: Keep up the good work!

label: break2
text1: You're doing great!

label: break3
text1: Let's keep going.

label: break4
text1: You are an expert at this!

label: break5
text1: You can do it!

label: lettersComplete
text1: You're all done! Thank you for helping me find those letters!
